Author: MathDad
Name: Senpan Admin Companion
Description: Serves as an alternative to many of the web-interface functions, allowing staff to operate various systems from within the game.
Punchline: Allows Senpan Tea House staff to use various app services right from the game.
Changelog: Adds the "It's Yoever" bingo controls: switch the reaction on/off for all players during a live game and watch the running "Yoevers" count update live.
